ELLORA

Exquisite · Curated · Memorable

Catering

Exquisite culinary experiences tailored to your event — from elegant plated dinners to lavish buffet spreads crafted by master chefs.

View Gallery

About This Service

Exquisite culinary experiences for every occasion

Food is the heartbeat of every celebration. At Ellora, we believe that every dish served should be as memorable as the occasion itself — beautifully presented, expertly crafted, and perfectly suited to your guests.

Our culinary team works with master chefs to create menus that span Indian, Continental, and fusion cuisines. From traditional thalis to molecular gastronomy — we cater to every palate and dietary requirement.

We handle everything from menu design and kitchen setup to service staff, crockery, and post-event cleanup — leaving nothing to chance.

What's Included

Everything You Need, Nothing Left to Chance

Master Chef Team

Experienced culinary professionals specialising in multi-cuisine event catering.

Custom Menu Design

Bespoke menus crafted to your event theme, guest preferences and dietary needs.

Premium Presentation

Elegant plating, live stations, and food displays that are as beautiful as they are delicious.

Dietary Accommodations

Vegetarian, vegan, Jain, gluten-free and allergy-aware options always available.

Our Work

Catering Portfolio

How It Works

Our Process

01

Menu Consultation

We discuss your cuisine preferences, guest count, and any dietary requirements.

02

Tasting Session

You taste and approve your menu before the event — no surprises on the day.

03

Kitchen & Logistics Setup

Our team sets up on-site kitchens, service stations and all equipment.

04

Service & Cleanup

Professional service staff throughout, followed by complete post-event cleanup.
